steps.title: Identify what aspect of Mark Wood's role requires emphasis
steps.content: Mark Wood's role is being an “electric violinist” who toured from 1999 to 2008. Emphasizing his role means making this specific identity and contribution the focal point of the sentence.

steps.title: Find which choice most directly emphasizes his role
steps.content:
Choice D directly presents “Mark Wood performed with TSO as a touring electric violinist,” placing his role as the core point of the sentence.

The other choices either omit his instrument, emphasize the time period instead of the role, or subsume his role into a broader statement about multiple musicians.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
